title: CloudDash API Authentication
content: CloudDash API requests use bearer token authentication. Send the API key in the Authorization header as Bearer <token>. Do not send API keys in query strings. Example curl request: curl -H "Authorization: Bearer $CLOUDDASH_API_KEY" https://api.clouddash.example/v1/monitors. API keys are workspace-scoped and inherit the permissions selected when the key is created. Rotate keys regularly and immediately after suspected exposure.
